detailed_paragraph:
Atlas Obscura + Synup

Add, claim, edit business listings & reviews on Atlas Obscura with Synup's listings & review management tools.

What is Atlas Obscura?

Atlas Obscura is an online platform and community-driven database that focuses on discovering and documenting unique and unusual places, events, and phenomena from around the world. It is known for celebrating the hidden wonders and lesser-known attractions that often go unnoticed by mainstream travel guides. Atlas Obscura offers a curated collection of articles, photographs, and user-generated content, allowing users to explore eccentric and offbeat destinations, historical oddities, and fascinating cultural experiences. It appeals to individuals with a curiosity for the extraordinary and a desire to explore the world's hidden gems.

Why Atlas Obscura + Synup?

  • Complete Control Over Listings: With the ability to manage your business listings on Atlas Obscura, you maintain full control over your online presence, ensuring your business is represented accurately.
  • Broaden Your Reach: Adding your business to Atlas Obscura through Synup means increased visibility. Help potential customers discover you, effectively expanding your reach.
  • Accurate Business Information: Enhance trust and credibility by publishing accurate information on Atlas Obscura.
  • Customer Engagement: View and respond back to reviews on Atlas Obscura, fostering a positive relationship with your customers, showing that you value their feedback and are attentive to their needs.

How to integrate Atlas Obscura + Synup?

The Atlas Obscura integration is available to all Synup listings plan subscribers. To view & manage the Atlas Obscura integration:

  1. Visit the Listings tab on Synup's console.
  2. Navigate to the Premium Listings section.
  3. Click on the Atlas Obscura logo to manage the Synup + Atlas Obscura integration and associated settings.
integration_summary: Atlas Obscura is an award winning global travel site specializing in exploratory travel and unique experiences.
